full_text:
Zhao Qi (Binqing) 趙岐 (邠卿)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Qi (趙岐), styledBinqing (邠卿), was born in Jingzhao. Sent to bring peace between Yuan Shao and Gongsun Zan, he served in many positions. Zhao Qi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Dong Zhuo, and Liu Biao. Zhao Qi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
